item.title: Added more demo content
item.description:
The test site now mixes multilingual bundles, single-language bundles, flat Markdown posts, and bilingual static pages.
![](sample.jpeg)
item.content:encoded: The test site now mixes multilingual bundles, single-language bundles, flat Markdown posts, and bilingual static pages.

item.title: Why this helps
item.description: A varied content set makes it easier to spot regressions in cards, translation toggles, archive pages, and mobile reading layout.
item.content:encoded: A varied content set makes it easier to spot regressions in cards, translation toggles, archive pages, and mobile reading layout.
